message:
feat(sync): track created/updated counts separately and fix comment collision safety

Add created_count and updated_count fields to ImportResult so
execute_import can display granular "Created" and "Updated" lines
instead of a lumped "Processed" total.  Rework sync_comments_for_import
to insert comments one-by-one with collision detection — if a comment
ID already belongs to a different issue or is <=0, a new auto-assigned
row is created instead of silently overwriting.  Exclude tombstoned
issues from external project capabilities query.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
